历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2022, the lowest rank for science was approximately 13,081; in 2023, approximately 11,181 (moved forward); in 2024, approximately 18,113 (moved backward); in 2025, physics category approximately 27,315 (significantly moved backward). Over the past three years, the cumulative backward movement is about 16,134, showing a clear backward trend; the 2025 baseline is approximately 27,315; provincial science/physics category plan: 76 in 2022, 81 in 2023, 81 in 2024, 84 in 2025, 85 in 2026. Compared to 2025, 2026 sees a slight expansion of 1 student (+1.2%), with a very small expansion rate, having limited impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; Soft Science main ranking: 80th in 2021, 76th in 2022, 75th in 2023, 75th in 2024, 83rd in 2025, 84th in 2026. In recent years, the ranking has slightly declined but remains stable around 80th, belonging to the upper-middle level of 211; the school's reputation has been stable in recent years, with no obvious negative public opinion incidents; Douyin popularity has not entered the national top 100, with average short video exposure; no filing gaps or abnormal admission records, stable psychological expectations for applications; Electrical Engineering is rated A-level, Power Engineering and Engineering Thermophysics rated A-, both core disciplines in the power industry. Electrical categories (including Electrical Engineering and Automation, Smart Grid Information Engineering) are the school's flagship majors, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The Electrical Engineering and Automation major was rated as 'highly recommended' in 2024, with continuously rising social popularity; Energy and Power majors received a 'recommended' rating. In 2026, the number of physics category candidates in the province is approximately 321,000 (estimated based on historical proportion), an increase of about 36,000 (+12.6%) compared to 285,000 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition; the school is located in Beijing, which has a certain regional appeal to Sichuan candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant backward trend in historical rankings, the notable increase in physics category candidates in 2026 (+12.6%), the minimal expansion of enrollment plan by only 1 student, and the continuously rising popularity of electrical majors, competition is expected to further intensify in 2026, with rankings continuing to move backward. The predicted lowest rank is approximately 27,710, with a range of 27,210–28,210.
